task_completion.description: Verify that Linear Regression is selected and the correct dependent variable is assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP Linear Regression analysis panel is open, and 'Happiness Score' is placed in the 'Dependent Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct predictor variables are assigned as covariates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'GDP per Capita', 'Family', 'Life Expectancy', and 'Freedom' are placed in the 'Covariates' box in the Linear Regression panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that collinearity diagnostics (VIF) are enabled and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Collinearity diagnostics' checkbox is ticked (usually under the 'Statistics' dropdown), OR the 'Tolerance' and 'VIF' columns are visible in the Coefficients table in the results pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required residual diagnostic plots are generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Residuals vs. predicted' and 'Q-Q plot standardized residuals' checkboxes are ticked (under the 'Plots' dropdown), OR the actual Q-Q plot and Residuals vs. Predicted plot are visible in the JASP results pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the analysis is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'happiness_regression.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory, OR the main JASP window title bar displays 'happiness_regression.jasp'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the JASP graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JASP application window is visible with the regression module active. The agent did not just write a script in a terminal or text editor to generate the file.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane displays standard JASP-formatted tables (Model Summary, ANOVA, Coefficients) and JASP-styled plots, rather than pasted text or mocked images.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the provided World Happiness dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The variable list in the left panel of JASP shows the columns from the World Happiness dataset (e.g., Happiness Score, GDP per Capita, Generosity, Trust), confirming the correct file was analyzed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a Linear Regression analysis in JASP. Dependent Variable: 'Happiness Score'. Covariates: 'GDP per Capita', 'Family', 'Life Expectancy', and 'Freedom'. Required diagnostics: Collinearity (VIF) must be enabled (adds VIF column to Coefficients table), and two plots must be generated: Residual Q-Q plot and Residuals vs. predicted plot. The final output must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/happiness_regression.jasp'.
